creator: apeiron+freebsd-bugs@isuckatdomains.net
text:
net-mgmt/nagios has a hard dependency on PHP. This is unnecessary and undesired. Please revert this change or make it optional. Thanks.

Fix: 

Remove the USE_PHP line from net-mgmt/nagios/Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: Try to install net-mgmt/nagios without wanting PHP.
Watch the ports tree pull in PHP without prompting.
